name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Intercept explicit gpt: handoff prompts and send Codex conversation plus repository context to ChatGPT.

interface.shortDescription: Send Codex planning work to ChatGPT
interface.longDescription: Intercepts explicit gpt: prompts before a Codex model turn, gathers the active Codex thread and Git repository context, and opens a prepared handoff in ChatGPT.
defaultPrompt: gpt: plan the safest implementation for the next requested feature
gpt-debug: diagnose the current failure without changing files
gpt-review: review the current working tree and staged changes
